leakage_rules.rule: Validation must be strictly later than training.
leakage_rules.application: The validation window starts after TRAIN_END_DATE.

leakage_rules.rule: Historical sales features must not use validation sales.
leakage_rules.application: Sales lags and rolling features must use at least a 16-day shift.

leakage_rules.rule: Baseline statistics must be learned only from train_model_base.
leakage_rules.application: Validation rows can only receive statistics computed from the training period.

leakage_rules.rule: The target column must never be used as a direct feature.
leakage_rules.application: sales is only used to build past-dependent features and evaluate predictions.

leakage_rules.rule: Transactions must not be used as predictive input.
leakage_rules.application: transactions is historical-only and not available for the future Kaggle test period.

leakage_rules.rule: Test data can validate schema but not model performance.
leakage_rules.application: The Kaggle test target is unknown and must not influence baseline selection.

notes: Transactions are excluded because they are not available for the future test period.
Historical sales features are created using time-safe calendar-based lookups.
Validation uses the last 16 days of the available training period.
No folders are created by this notebook.
